results.title: ‘Genuine human error...’: Ram Charan apologises after calling Jasprit Bumrah a footballer
results.description: Actor Ram Charan has apologised to Indian cricketer Jasprit Bumrah after mistakenly referring to him as a footballer during an event of ‘Peddi’ in Bhopal. The actor’s back-to-back slip-ups at the event have quickly gone viral on social media, triggering widespread reactions online. The Bhopal event for the upcoming film was held on Saturday and [...]

results.title: Aishwarya Rai Urges Aspiring Actors to Stay Authentic in ‘Manufactured’ World
results.description: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan has shared advice for aspiring actors entering the film industry, encouraging them to stay true to themselves and avoid getting caught up in a world she described as increasingly “manufactured.” Speaking to Brut India during her appearance at the Cannes Film Festival, Aishwarya reflected on the artistic journey and said that creativity [...] The post Aishwarya Rai Urges Aspiring Actors to Stay Authentic in ‘Manufactured’ World appeared first on ANC .

results.title: Tridha Chaudhary reveals which Bollywood star she would love to work with
results.description: Mumbai: Actress Tridha Choudhury revealed the one Bollywood actor she would love to work with. Speaking exclusively to IANS, the 'Aashram' actress revealed that she is a big admirer of Ranveer Singh...
